context: A pivotal moment in this round of 16 match. France lead Poland 3-1. The game hangs in the balance — every decision from the touchline could decide the outcome.

options.label: A
options.action: Defensive substitution — bring on a fresh center-back, sit deep

options.label: B
options.action: Drop deeper as a unit, protect the lead, counter-attack

options.label: C
options.action: Keep attacking — the best defense is a good offense

options.label: D
options.action: Bring on a defensive midfielder, switch to 5-4-1

real_decision.description: France won 3-1. Olivier Giroud (43'), Kylian Mbappé Lottin (73'), Kylian Mbappé Lottin (90'), Robert Lewandowski (98').

pre_generated_explanations.A:
**OPTION A — Defensive substitution — bring on a fresh center-back, sit deep**
Risk level: Medium. This is the safe, professional choice that protects the lead without abandoning attacking threat. In the context of this round of 16 match between France and Poland (3-1), this option addresses the tactical challenge but requires precise execution from the players on the pitch.
pre_generated_explanations.B:
**OPTION B — Drop deeper as a unit, protect the lead, counter-attack**
Risk level: Low. This is a solid conservative choice that prioritizes defensive stability. Low risk of conceding, but may invite pressure. In the context of this round of 16 match between France and Poland (3-1), this option addresses the tactical challenge but requires precise execution from the players on the pitch.
pre_generated_explanations.C:
**OPTION C — Keep attacking — the best defense is a good offense**
Risk level: High. This is the aggressive choice. Keeping attacking intent when leading can catch opponents off guard but leaves defensive gaps. In the context of this round of 16 match between France and Poland (3-1), this option addresses the tactical challenge but requires precise execution from the players on the pitch.
pre_generated_explanations.D:
**OPTION D — Bring on a defensive midfielder, switch to 5-4-1**
Risk level: Low. This is the ultra-defensive option. Maximum security at the back, but surrenders possession and invites sustained pressure. In the context of this round of 16 match between France and Poland (3-1), this option addresses the tactical challenge but requires precise execution from the players on the pitch.
